stemHtml: A particular DME ground station is very busy and can sometimes be used by more than 100 aircraft at a time. When during one of these extremely busy periods, the DME ground station may not respond to some aircraft based on...

options.a: the transmitter power of the aircraft and its range from the DME.
options.b: how long each aircraft has been searching for a lock-on, with the one waiting longest having the highest priority.
options.c: the type of aircraft operation, with aircraft on IFR approaches having the highest priority.
options.d: the range of the aircraft from the DME, and how long it has been searching for a lock-on.
